trivia_bullets.text: Tempered Veteran is an uncommon from Core Set 2021 (M21, released 2020-07-03) and functions as a signpost uncommon for white's +1/+1 counters archetype in limited. Its Wizards preview article appeared under the title 'Signpost Selesnya 2020,' confirming the design intent to telegraph the white-green counters draft archetype.

A 1/2 Human Knight for 1W with two activated counter abilities — cheap conditional ({W},{T} for a creature with an existing counter) and expensive unrestricted ({4}{W}{W},{T} for any creature). In limited pairs with Basri's Solidarity and Basri's Acolyte. EDHREC rank: 22,106 — minimal Commander uptake; primarily a draft-environment card.
sources: Card Kingdom Blog: Core 2021 Draft Guide (via WebSearch)

trivia_bullets.text: Flavor text: 'I've been carrying a sword since before you were born. I wouldn't give up my oath for all the peace and comfort in the world.' — Speaker is the unnamed knight depicted on the card. No official Wizards source identifies this figure as a named lore character. The text frames her as someone who chose oath over comfort across a lifetime.

Artist Izzy Medrano (credited as Izzy) has over 200 MTG illustrations across cards, promo art, marketing, and comics. His career includes work on God of War, Starhawk, and Dungeons & Dragons. Tempered Veteran is one of many knightly/warrior-type figures Izzy has rendered for Wizards.

related_cards.name: Basri's Acolyte
related_cards.note: White counter-matters creature; Tempered Veteran's primary limited partner

related_cards.name: Basri's Solidarity
related_cards.note: Mass-counter spell in the same M21 white counters package
